title: Export tool schemas + per-tool annotations (PAIRED COMMIT per Gemini G6)
description: Per Gemini G6: schema golden snapshots before annotations = 100% test failure on annotation add. MUST ship snapshot tests + annotations in SAME commit. Two paired sub-tasks combined: (1) Lift inline Zod input/output schemas from tools/{plan-context,get-rules,rule-sections}.ts to packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts; per-tool golden snapshot at __snapshots__/tool-contracts/. (2) Add tool annotations: readOnlyHint / idempotentHint / destructiveHint / openWorldHint / title.
scope: Layer 2 P0 — closes #1 MCP failure category (38% schema drift) + spec compliance for annotations

files.change: NEW: barrel export of plan-context input/output schema, get-rules input/output schema, rule-sections input/output schema (lifted from inline)

Import from shared/schemas/api-contracts (no inline z.object). Add server.registerTool annotations: readOnlyHint:true, idempotentHint:true, destructiveHint:false, openWorldHint:false, title:'Plan rule context'
NEW: golden snapshot of input/output schema (JSON Schema form) + annotations
NEW: per-tool snapshot tests using vitest toMatchSnapshot; failure message includes 'pnpm test -u' hint

criteria: All 3 tools register with full annotation set (readOnlyHint, idempotentHint, destructiveHint, openWorldHint, title)
All 3 golden snapshots committed; toMatchSnapshot test passes
Snapshot test failure message includes pnpm test -u hint
Tests + annotations land in SAME commit (Gemini G6)

metadata.commit_pairing: MUST ship same commit (Gemini G6 — avoid 100% snapshot churn)
